sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Omega guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Omega Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Omega
hero.summary: Omega starts best on Insight (4pc) + Valor (2pc) with Speed necklace and ATK% ring. From there, branch into the High-end route and the PvP route as your gear options widen.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Omega feels best once ATK%, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and ATK% ring.
Substat focus: ATK%, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and Speed.
Journey: Hard route leans toward DPS - AX5.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Special >= Ultimate >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Special
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Ultimate
steps.detail: Ultimate is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep ATK% and Crit Rate stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 3 / 3, with 7 / 7 / 7 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the PvE / PvP line with Insight (4pc) + Valor (2pc) and Speed necklace and ATK% ring. Move into the High-end route and the PvP route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: PvE / PvP
sets.note: PvE / PvP keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: High-end
sets.note: High-end keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: PvP
sets.note: PvP keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

priorities: Substats: ATK(%), Crit Rate, Crit DMG, SPD

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and ATK% ring, then stack ATK%, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and Speed through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: ★★☆ Strong gains from extra copies
Substat focus: ATK%, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and Speed

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Lacy and Muriel. Fill the remaining slots with Bunny Frey, Charlotte, and Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: Auto-Hunt System
items.summary: Omega's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Pew Pew!
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Mega Punch!
items.summary: Special is the first real investment breakpoint for this build and usually defines the early payoff window.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: The Biggest and Coolest One!
items.summary: Ultimate still helps anchor the opener, even when the build upgrades Special first.
